dim.name: nVcoarsenLevels
dim.description: Maximum number of vertically coarsened depth levels

nml_option.name: config_AM_vcoarsen_enable
nml_option.description: If true, ocean analysis member vcoarsen is called.

nml_option.name: config_AM_vcoarsen_compute_interval
nml_option.description: Timestamp determining how often analysis member computation should be performed.

nml_option.name: config_AM_vcoarsen_output_stream
nml_option.description: Name of the stream that the vcoarsen analysis member should be tied to.

nml_option.name: config_AM_vcoarsen_compute_on_startup
nml_option.description: Logical flag determining if an analysis member computation occurs on start-up.

nml_option.name: config_AM_vcoarsen_write_on_startup
nml_option.description: Logical flag determining if an analysis member write occurs on start-up.

nml_option.name: config_AM_vcoarsen_depth_bounds
nml_option.description: Comma-separated depth boundaries (m) defining coarsened layers.

nml_option.name: config_AM_vcoarsen_fields
nml_option.description: Comma-separated field names to vertically coarsen.

nml_option.name: config_AM_vcoarsen_select_levels
nml_option.description: Comma-separated level indices for level selection.

nml_option.name: config_AM_vcoarsen_select_depths
nml_option.description: Comma-separated depth values (m) for nearest-depth selection.

package.name: vcoarsenAMPKG
package.description: This package includes variables required for the vcoarsen analysis member.

var.name: layerThicknessCoarsened
var.description: Vertically coarsened layer thickness (sum of overlap)
